errorMessage.title: Error Message
errorMessage.description: Populated only when status="Error". Contains the underlying exception message. Surface verbatim to the user and stop.

matchCount.title: Match Count
matchCount.description: Total matching records found. When greater than 5, only the first 5 are returned in records and status is "TooMany".

records.title: Records
records.description: List of matched records (up to 5). Each item contains recordId (Salesforce Id), name (record name), displayLabel (pre-formatted "Name — context" string suitable for showing to the user as-is), and secondaryInfo (facility/phone for doctors, city/state for facilities).

status.title: Status
status.description: Result status. One of: "Success" (lookup completed — see records), "NotFound" (zero matches), "TooMany" (more than 5 matches — ask user for more details and re-invoke), "Error" (see errorMessage).
